title: polypogon alpestris
intro: Polypogon alpestris, also known as mountain hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypogon alpestris include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Polypogon alpestris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
